name: 2.1d-5 Space: clear-and-advance moves one cell forward within the word onto a filled next cell, no filled-skip (advance is fill-agnostic; ROADMAP Wave 2.1d keyboard map)
2.1d-5 Space: clear-and-advance moves one cell forward within the word onto an empty next cell (ROADMAP Wave 2.1d keyboard map)
2.1d-5 Space: at the word's end forward advance clamps and stays put, never crossing into the next word (canEscapeWord false; ROADMAP Wave 2.1d keyboard map)
